roa.docketEntryComment: SIGNED BLANKET APP & ORD RE; DISPOSAL OF EXHIBITS FILED
APP & ORD RE; DISPOSAL OF EXHIBITS FILED
DA'S SENTENCING MEMORANDUM RECOMMENDATION, FILED

/CAL:PROVE UP HEARING ON PRIOR AND SENTENCING BEFORE JUDGE ANDREW Y,S, CHENG IN DEPT, 606/JAVS/X:DEFENDANT'S OBJECTION TO CONTINUANCE OF TRIAL ON SPEEDY TRIAL  GROUNDS (PC 1382) IS FILED IN COURT,/X:MATTER IS ARGUED AND SUBMITTED, COURT FINDS THAT COURT'S EXHIBIT 1 IS ADEQUATE EVIDENCE FOR PROVING UP THE PRIOR AND FINDS THE PRIOR ALLEGATION TO BE TRUE,/EXHMA: COURT'S EXHIBIT 1/X:SENTENCES AS TO COUNTS 1 AND 2 ARE AS FOLLOWS:/TWS/CH1:ISS:PROB5 Y:PJ 35D/CTS: 1/SWAPD:7-17-17/X:IF 18 MONTHS OF ADULT PROBATION IS COMPLETED SUCCESSFULLY, THE DEFENDANTMAY BRING A MOTION TO CONVERT THE REMAINING 42 MONTHS TO INFORMAL COURT PROBATION,/PF1000 12/VF2:150/DDP2/X:(18 MONTH SECOND OFFENDER PROGRAM)/LVAL/LCHEM/IID:1/LSUSF:24/X:LICENSE SUSPENSIONSHALL CONFORM WITH DMV REQUIREMENTS,/PROBREVFN/PC/COA:40/ICNA/EMAT/CITE/1463ALC/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/APPEAL/654:2/

/CAL  JURY TRIAL IN DEPT, 606, BEFORE JUDGE CHENG,/JAVS/X JURY INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN FILED,/X:THE DEFENSE MAKES AN ORAL MOTION FOR JUDGMENT OF ACQUITTAL OF COUNT 2 PURSUANT TO PC1118,1,/X:THE PEOPLE OPPOSE THE MOTION,/ARG&SUB/MO DENIED/X:RENEWED PC1118,1 MOTION IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE,/TRL PHASE VT/X: JURY RETURNS VERDICT AS FOLLOWS:/X: GUILTY ON COUNTS 1 AND 2,//CONTD:SENTENCE AND POST-TRIAL MOTIONS/TWS/DOP/

/CAL: JURY TRIAL IN DEPT, 606, BEFORE JUDGE CHENG/X:PAPERS FILED: 1) PEOPLE'S TRIAL BRIEF AND MOTIONS IN LIMINE; 2) PEOPLE'SSUPPLEMENTAL MOTIONS IN LIMINE; 3) PEOPLE'S OPPOSITION TO DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE PURSUANT TO PC 1538,5; 4)DEFENDANT'S MOTIONS IN LIMINE 1 THROUGH 14,; 5) PEOPLE'S MOTION TO RECONSIDER PEOPLE'S MOTION TO CONTINUE,/X:THE COURT CONDUCTS A PC 1538,5 MOTION TO SUPPRESS HRG,/X:JOSHUA HUGHES, CHP OFFICER SWORN AND EXAMINED,/X: DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE IS DENIED,/X: PEOPLE'S MOTION FOR A TRIAL CONTINUANCE IS DENIED,/TRL PHASE JS/CONTD: JURYTRIAL (PEOPLE'S CASE)/

/CAL:TRIAL/NP/X:THE DEFENDANT IS ON A 2 HR STANDBY/LDTR:05-15-17 (STW)//X:BOTH SIDES ARE READY/X:JUDGE DAVID M, KRASHNA ORDERS THE FOLLOWING CASE(S) TO BE HEARD BY  JUDGE ANDREW CHENG ON 05-15-17 AT 9AM IN DEPT 606/X:ORAL MOTION TO CONTINUE IS DENIED/CONT/DOPC/
